top_signals.title: Taiwan’s drone ambitions play to its tech manufacturing strengths
top_signals.summary: Scaling up brings economies of scale, and the island is taking another lesson from China’s playbook: dual-use technology
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Daiwa AM Boosts Staff in Shift Toward Institutional Investors
top_signals.summary: Daiwa Asset Management Co. is planning to double its sales staff targeting institutional investors to about 20 people, its president said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘You will have a painful fall’: SEC’s Peirce warns crypto vault builders against twisting securities law
top_signals.summary: Hester Peirce, aka "Crypto Mom", issued a statement clarifying that onchain vaults and lending may fall under the SEC's remit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
top_signals.summary: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Google reports $6bn cash burn last quarter as it raises AI spending again
top_signals.summary: Search giant says it will commit up to $205bn on AI investments in 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto Long & Short: The crypto question isn't what to own — it's what you can survive holding
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Clifford Chance partners pocket £2.3m as private markets drive growth
top_signals.summary: Magic circle firm Clifford Chance’s revenue surpassed £2.6bn for the first time, largely driven by the surge in private market work. The firm’s revenue was up 9 per cent from £2.4bn last year, as the Canary Wharf-headquartered firm said that while all service lines performed well, the hike was driven largely by “momentum in the private markets” [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Offshore Safety: Improving Injury Rates May Be Masking Continued Fatalities
top_signals.summary: Improving injury rates are masking the continued threat of fatal accidents across the offshore marine contracting industry, according to the International Marine Contractors Association (IMCA) after its latest Annual Safety Statistics Report…
